ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population estimate */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the state */,
  "report_date_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the report date */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the gender */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the race */,
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the ethnicity */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count of the demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the data source */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("ethnicity_id") REFERENCES ethnicities ("ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_report_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_date_id") REFERENCES report_dates ("report_date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_estimates_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the state belongs */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the state in square miles */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages represented by the group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  "age_group_order" INTEGER /* Order of the age group for reporting purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender type */,
  "gender_type" TEXT /* Type of gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gender type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the race category */,
  "race_order" INTEGER /* Order of the race categories for reporting purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ethnicities" (
  "ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ethnicity */,
  "ethnicity_order" INTEGER /* Order of the ethnicities for reporting purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_dates" (
  "report_date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report date */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the population estimate report */,
  "report_year" INTEGER /* Year of the report */,
  "report_month" INTEGER /* Month of the report */,
  "report_day" INTEGER /* Day of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference identifier for the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the demographic summary */,
  "average_age" REAL /* Average age of the population in the state */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_summary_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state for which data is accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
